name: Pressure Cooked Seitan
recipeInstructions:
1. Prep time: 30 to 40 minutes
2. Prepare the mix and water as instructed on the Basic Seitan box.
3. Prepare the broth for 14 oz.
4. Cut the seitan into 8 even pieces and place them with the broth in the pressure cooker.
5. Bring the contents to a simmer.
6. Attach the lid securely.
7. When up to pressure, reduce heat to allow cooking for an additional 25 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and let the pressure release naturally until it drops.
9. The seitan is ready to eat.
